decks.title: 現メタ最強候補
decks.theme: 現環境で最も安定して勝てる完成度の高いデッキ。上位メタに五分以上戦える構築
decks.strategy: This deck leverages a robust four-color mana base to play a controlling game through efficient removal and powerful card advantage. Early turns focus on disruption with counterspells and targeted burn, while Stock Up and Accumulate Wisdom dig for key pieces. Mid-to-late game, Jeskai Revelation provides massive value, generating tokens, dealing damage, and refilling the hand. Tolarian Terror offers a cheap, resilient threat, and Thousand-Year Storm delivers an explosive, game-winning turn by copying multiple instants and sorceries.
decks.mtga:
Deck
4 Hallowed Fountain
4 Steam Vents
4 Sacred Foundry
4 Godless Shrine
4 Blood Crypt
4 Watery Grave
1 Great Hall of the Biblioplex
4 Jeskai Revelation
4 Stock Up
3 Accumulate Wisdom
4 Inevitable Defeat
4 Combustion Technique
3 Firebending Lesson
4 Abandon Attachments
1 Gran-Gran
2 Spell Pierce
2 Negate
2 Thousand-Year Storm
2 Tolarian Terror

decks.title: メタに刺すアグロ
decks.theme: コントロールが多い現環境を、軽いクロックと火力で素早く殴り切るアグロ
decks.strategy: This deck aims to quickly pressure control opponents with a low mana curve of aggressive creatures. It utilizes efficient burn spells to clear blockers and directly damage the opponent, maintaining a high tempo. Key threats like Slickshot Show-Off and Anim Pakal, Thousandth Moon, along with versatile Boros Charm, provide the necessary tools to close out games before control decks can stabilize.
decks.mtga:
Deck
4 Fanatical Firebrand
4 Savannah Lions
4 Novice Inspector
4 Shock
3 Torch the Tower
2 Lavaspur Boots
4 Charming Scoundrel
4 Lightning Strike
4 Slickshot Show-Off
2 Boros Charm
3 Anim Pakal, Thousandth Moon
4 Sacred Foundry
4 Inspiring Vantage
4 Abraded Bluffs
5 Mountain
5 Plains

decks.title: 受け切りコントロール
decks.theme: 除去と打ち消しで相手を捌き切り、強力な勝ち筋で蓋をするコントロール
decks.strategy: 除去と打ち消しで序盤を凌ぎ、豊富なドローとマナ加速でリソースを圧倒します。最終的に、Niv-Mizzet, Guildpact、Ugin, Eye of the Storms、Chimil, the Inner Sunといった強力なフィニッシャーでゲームを支配し、対戦相手に勝利の機会を与えません。
decks.mtga:

4 Hallowed Fountain
4 Watery Grave
4 Steam Vents
4 Blood Crypt
2 Breeding Pool
1 Temple Garden
1 Overgrown Tomb
1 Stomping Ground
1 Godless Shrine
1 Sacred Foundry
1 Command Bridge

1 Restless Reef
1 Restless Spire

4 No More Lies

decks.title: ローグ好みの変則コンボ
decks.theme: 意表を突く2〜3枚のコンボや変則的な勝ち筋で決める、ローグ好みのデッキ
decks.strategy: このデッキは、ピーター・パーカーのカメラとテゼレット、冷酷な船長の能力を組み合わせて《千年暦》にチャージカウンターを高速で蓄積し、対戦相手全員に1000点のダメージを与えてゲームに勝利するコンボデッキです。カウンター呪文とパーマネント保護呪文で主要なコンボパーツを守り抜き、遅延戦術を駆使するコントロールデッキに対して意表を突く勝ち筋を狙います。
decks.mtga:
Deck
4 The Millennium Calendar
4 Peter Parker's Camera
4 Tezzeret, Cruel Captain
4 Beseech the Mirror
4 Springleaf Drum
4 Gingerbrute
2 Opt
2 Sleight of Hand

4 Blood Crypt

4 Watery Grave

2 Swamp
2 Mountain
2 Crystal Grotto
